name: Baked Potato Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add water.
2. Add white bread flour.
3. Add dry milk, sugar, and salt.
4. Stir in sour cream.
5. Mix in potato flakes, bacon bits, chives, and yeast according to the automatic bread machine instructions.
6. The dough will be very dry. Do not add additional water.
7. For best flavor, use real bacon bits (labeled 'real bacon bits' in some recipes).
8. Bake using either the regular or rapid bake cycle.
